recommendations.title: Wickie the Mighty Viking
recommendations.overview: One morning our little Viking village of Flake is raided by frightening looking spooky demons who kidnap all the children… except for Wickie, who was stuck in a tree trying to use a kite to learn to fly.

recommendations.title: Manitou's Canoe

recommendations.title: Lissi and the Wild Emperor
recommendations.overview: The plot concerns a yeti who makes a pact with the devil to kidnap the most beautiful girl in the world. This turns out to be the Princess Lissi, who is clearly the Austrian Princess and later Empress Elisabeth of Bavaria, and much of the film is tak

recommendations.title: Balloon
recommendations.overview: Two families attempt a daredevil plan to escape the GDR with a homemade hot air balloon, but it crashes just before the border. The Stasi finds traces of this attempt to escape and immediately starts investigations, while the two families are forced

recommendations.title: Manitou's Shoe
recommendations.overview: Abahachi, Chief of the Apache Indians, and his blood brother Ranger maintain peace and justice in the Wild West. One day, Abahachi needs to take up a credit from the Shoshone Indians to finance his tribe's new saloon. Unfortunately Santa Maria, who s

recommendations.title: Lost in Translation
recommendations.overview: Two lost souls visiting Tokyo -- the young, neglected wife of a photographer and a washed-up movie star shooting a TV commercial -- find an odd solace and pensive freedom to be real in each other's company, away from their lives in America.

recommendations.title: Jim Button and Luke the Engine Driver
recommendations.overview: A young orphan boy Jim Button, his best friend Luke and a magical steam engine called Emma travel across the world in search of the truth about where Jim came from. Battling pirates and dragons, outsmarting make-believe giants, they must travel throu

recommendations.title: Bugs Bunny's Looney Christmas Tales
recommendations.overview: A TV movie special that compiles of a few Looney Tunes episodes centered around an episode of a Christmas Carol, with the part of Scrooge played by Yosemite Sam.

recommendations.title: Dance Academy: The Movie
recommendations.overview: This 2017 movie follows the original dance academy TV show and tracks where the characters are in their lives now.
